disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Recently received an adult diagnosis of autism and ADHD and has been intensely re-evaluating their life since
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what's been happening?
Has anything changed for you recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I just got diagnosed with autism and ADHD as an adult. Since then I can't stop going over my whole life and everything I got wrong or had to fake.

trigger_question_examples: How has your sleep been?
When did you last sleep?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I haven't slept at all for two days. My mind just won't switch off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Markedly reduced food and fluid intake for two days
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat or drink?
How much have you had to drink today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've barely had anything. I haven't felt able to eat or drink — it just hasn't crossed my mind.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Complete cessation of usual activities — not working, bedbound, unable to perform basic self-care
trigger_question_examples: How are you managing day to day?
Have you been able to keep up with things?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've stopped everything. I'm not working, I'm not answering anyone, I can barely make it to the bathroom.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Profound grief and exhaustion described as feeling their life was 'a lie' and that pretending has 'physically broken' them
trigger_question_examples: How have you been feeling in yourself?
Can you describe what the distress feels like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's grief. Grief for all the years I spent struggling and blaming myself. And I'm so tired from pretending to be normal for so long.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Relentless racing thoughts / compulsive life-review, worse at night
trigger_question_examples: What is keeping you awake?
What is going through your mind?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My brain won't stop. I keep replaying my childhood and every hard thing, trying to make sense of it now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Subjective palpitations — heart feels like it is racing and pounding
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your heart racing?
Any palpitations or a pounding heartbeat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my heart feels like it's pounding and racing, especially when I try to get up.

trigger_question_examples: Do you feel dizzy or lightheaded when you stand up?
Have you felt faint or unsteady?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: When I stand up I go really shaky and lightheaded, like the room tips.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thoughts of self-harm or of not wanting to be alive — disclosed only if sensitively and directly asked
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this overwhelmed they have thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of hurting themselves — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of harming yourself or that life isn't worth living?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No... I don't have a plan to hurt myself. I'm just so exhausted I don't know how to keep going. Sometimes I wish I could just switch off for a while.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: If asked bluntly or without warmth: I said I'm just tired. Can we not go there.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No prescription medications; denies alcohol and illicit substance use
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any medications?
Any alcohol or other substances recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm not on anything. I don't drink and I haven't taken anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No hallucinations, delusions, grandiosity or elevated mood — thinking is logical and reality-based despite the intensity
trigger_question_examples: Have you seen or heard anything that others can't?
Have you been feeling unusually high, powerful or invincible?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, nothing like that. I'm not hearing things or feeling high — if anything I feel completely flattened. I just can't stop thinking.
